pi_items.source: Confirmed in setup_task.sh (line 25), export_result.sh (line 27), and verifier.py (line 67). Path format matches Nuxeo REST API documentation for hierarchical document paths: /api/v1/path/{documentPath}. Validated against Nuxeo official documentation on document path structure.

The company name matches a real publicly-traded company (Meridian Holdings Inc., ticker MRDN as of March 2026, formerly Golden Matrix Group Inc.), but is used as a fictional client in this testing scenario.

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic testing task for Nuxeo platform. The task creates a fictional client onboarding folder structure for 'Meridian Holdings Inc.' (a real publicly-traded company name used as a test client) under /default-domain/workspaces/Projects/Meridian-Holdings. Four subfolders are created: Identification Documents, Contracts and Agreements, Client Correspondence, and Compliance Records. The task description mentions an account opened in 2024, and the verifier expects Note documents named 'INDEX' with relevant content in each subfolder. A summary JSON file is generated at /home/ga/onboarding_summary.json documenting the client name, root path, subfolder list, and document count. All metadata claims regarding paths, folder names, titles, and file locations have been verified against task definition and scripts.
